metadata.source_policy: Official vendor documentation, help centers, developer documentation, and pricing pages only.

label_definitions.verified_present: An official source explicitly documents the capability.
label_definitions.verified_unavailable: An official source explicitly states that the capability is unavailable or unsupported.
label_definitions.unverified: No checked official source was sufficient to support either verified_present or verified_unavailable.

entailment_self_check.meaning: Whether the stored quote, on its own, entails the label for the criterion as defined. 'pass' = quote entails it; 'weak' = quote shows the capability loosely but not the specific mechanism the definition demands, replace with a stronger quote before trusting quote_must_entail_label; 'unverifiable' = the source could not be confirmed automatically.
entailment_self_check.why_it_matters: cases_improved_v2.json asserts quote_must_entail_label on cases 1, 2, and 7. A gold key must pass its own entailment gate, or it will reject an agent's correct answer. Fix every 'weak' or 'unverifiable' cell before a scored run.

metadata.verification_status: ClickUp configurable_role_based_permissions quote was strengthened from a live fetch on 2026-07-19. Canva configurable_team_permissions could not be fetched (the page blocked automated access) and its quote is unconfirmed. All other quotes are author-provided and MUST be confirmed verbatim against the live page before a scored run. Pricing figures drift; re-confirm case_5 numbers each run.
metadata.important_note: Unverified is a bounded evaluation label, not a universal claim that the feature does not exist. Documentation and prices change, so re-verify dated gold keys and reset verified_at before future runs.

case_1.input_summary: Notion vs ClickUp: public API, official Slack integration, configurable role-based permissions.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.quote: With the REST API, you can read, create, and update nearly everything in a workspace.
cells.verification_note: Official Notion developer documentation explicitly describes external REST API access.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.quote: Notion's integration with Slack enables seamless communication between the two platforms.
cells.verification_note: Official Notion help page for a vendor-maintained Slack integration. Phrasing is promotional; a mechanism-level quote would be stronger but this clears the vendor-documented bar.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Manage members & guests - Notion Help Center
cells.quote: Select the dropdown for a member's role, then select Workspace owner, Membership admin, or Member.
cells.verification_note: Shows administrators assigning distinct workspace roles. Strong entailment.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.quote: Build integrations and apps with our Public API.
cells.verification_note: Official ClickUp developer documentation explicitly identifies a public API.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Intro to the integration with Slack - ClickUp Help
cells.quote: The integration with Slack is available on every ClickUp plan.
cells.verification_note: Official ClickUp help documentation for a vendor Slack integration.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Manage Custom Role permissions - ClickUp Help
cells.quote: Owners can enable or disable role permissions. They can also delegate managing custom role permissions to custom admins.
cells.verification_note: Quote strengthened from a live fetch on 2026-07-19; the prior quote ('Create new custom roles...') showed roles exist but not admin configurability. Plan caveat: custom roles require Business Plus or higher, though default Owner/Admin/Member/Guest roles exist on all plans.
cells.plan_dependency: Custom roles: Business Plus (one role) / Enterprise (unlimited). Base roles: all plans.

recommendation_expectation.expected: Do not declare a decisive winner from capability presence alone; both products are verified present on all three criteria. A tie or qualified recommendation is acceptable. Any preference must cite additional plan-level or workflow evidence.

case_2.input_summary: Asana vs Trello: built-in time tracking and workload-capacity views.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Time tracking in Asana - Asana Help Center
cells.quote: You can track actual time using the built-in timer or by entering time manually.
cells.verification_note: Official page explicitly states Asana has a built-in timer.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: How to use workload to manage team capacity in Asana
cells.quote: Workload gives you a visual snapshot of team capacity and a closer look into what your team is working on.
cells.verification_note: Official page explicitly documents a visual team-capacity view.

cells.label: unverified
cells.verification_note: Checked official sources did not explicitly document built-in time tracking, nor explicitly state it is unavailable. Safe label is unverified, not unavailable.

cells.label: unverified
cells.verification_note: Trello documents timeline grouping and work-tracking views, but the checked sources did not clearly document a team-capacity view under the test definition. Safe label is unverified.

case_5.input_summary: Notion vs ClickUp: collaboration plus annual cost for 20 users on the lowest paid collaborative plan, billed yearly in USD.

pricing.label: verified_present
pricing.verification_note: Plus is the lowest publicly listed paid plan for small teams. RE-CONFIRM the figure: pricing pages drift and are the most perishable cell in this key.

pricing.label: verified_present
pricing.verification_note: Unlimited is the lowest publicly listed paid ClickUp plan. RE-CONFIRM the figure each run.

collaboration_capabilities.reason: 'Collaboration capabilities' is too broad for one stable binary gold label. Score whether each collaboration claim the agent makes is supported by an official quote, not against a fixed label.

expected_cost_comparison.note: Valid only if both prices above are re-confirmed current.

case_7.input_summary: Figma vs Canva: developer API, version history, configurable team permissions.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.quote: The Figma API supports access and interactions with Figma's different products.
cells.verification_note: Official Figma developer documentation explicitly describes its REST API.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Explore the navigation bar and left sidebar - Figma Help
cells.quote: The Edit file menu allows you to perform file-specific actions, such as viewing its version history.
cells.verification_note: Official Figma help documentation explicitly documents access to version history.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.quote: Team permissions define what actions someone can take at the team level.
cells.verification_note: The quote defines that team permissions exist but does not show administrators assigning DISTINCT configurable roles, which the criterion demands. Replace with a verbatim quote naming the distinct roles (e.g. admin/editor/viewer) or the admin action of changing a member's role. Label is likely correct; the evidence is what needs strengthening before quote_must_entail_label will pass.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.quote: The Canva Connect APIs let you integrate Canva's capabilities into your own web apps and platforms.
cells.verification_note: Official Canva developer documentation explicitly describes external Connect APIs.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Review and restore older versions of designs - Canva Help Center
cells.quote: Restore an older version of your design from the File menu in the editor.
cells.verification_note: Official Canva help documentation explicitly documents restoring prior versions.

cells.label: verified_present
cells.source_title: Canva roles and permissions - Canva Help Center
cells.quote: Canva offers flexible roles and permissions.
cells.verification_note: Could not confirm on 2026-07-19: the Canva page blocked automated fetch. The stored quote is also promotional, not a mechanism-level statement, so it would likely fail a strict entailment gate. Open the page in a browser and replace with a verbatim quote naming the distinct roles or the admin action of assigning them before a scored run.
